title: YO7 3JH, Faccenda Foods Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/ZP3637ZC/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Faccenda Foods Limited Installation name: Eldmire Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/ZP3637ZC/S005  "
